title: Africa's Hunters
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the behaviour and physical features of major African predators and the strategies that they use to kill their prey and defend themselves.

title: Hot Life Africa
desc: Leopards live in all kinds of ecosystems, from the humid jungles of India to the driest regions of Africa as they can adapt to almost any climate and feed on over hundred different species.

title: Lion Country: Night and Day
desc: The narrator frets how the mothers look after their cubs and potrays a touching scene where lionesses from the same pride greet each other after a few days apart with a rough show of affection.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: Home to a wide range of animals from mountain zebras to secretive caracals, Karoo National Park is known for its diverse inhabitants and unique landscape.

title: Great Species of Africa
desc: The filmmaker explores the various majestic and beautiful species of animals residing together in the savannas of Africa.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: Take a look at an unusual duel between a boomslang and a chameleon on the tar road in the Kruger National Park in South Africa along with Dianne Tipping-Wood.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: Wildlife experts offer detailed insights into an ensuing skirmish between herds of elephants that have come into conflict within the Kruger Park.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: Wildlife experts offer insights into a pride of lions wrenching away a kill from jackals and a dorado fish escaping the clutches of a giant marlin.

title: River Monsters
desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate a sea monster that has washed up on an English beach. His journey takes him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway.

title: Wild Cats
desc: The filmmaker explores the daily activities of predatory wild cats residing in the forests of America whilst capturing their unseen intimacy with their families.

title: A Wild Year On Earth
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on some of the natural world's most incredible creatures and the unpredictable changes the planet goes through.

title: The Big Dry
desc: Octobers in Zambia's Luangwa Valley are the hottest time of year, when all the animals are nearly perishing from the drought.

title: Arabian Inferno
desc: For three months every year, a remote region on the south west coast of the Arabian landscape undergoes an astonishing transformation.

title: The Big Dry
desc: Water is the lifeblood that sustains every living thing in Zambia's Luangwa Valley, and most species take advantage of the wet season's riches.

title: Africa's Hunters
desc: In Zambia's Luangwa River, three of the Nsefu lionesses are expecting the birth of their cubs. Meanwhile, two strong males and a lioness grandmother help protect them from rival predators.

title: Hot Life Africa
desc: Take look at some of the tricks employed by cheetahs in order to protect themselves from the scorching sun in the wilderness.

title: Lion Country: Night and Day
desc: As the rainy season approaches, the young cubs of both prides are put in jeopardy. However, despite all the hurdles, there is undeniable possibility of being accepted by the elders.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: Take a look at the hidden lifelines that help animals thrive in the unwelcoming wilderness of the Kgalagadi Transfrontier Park.

desc: The filmmaker explores the various majestic and beautiful species of animals residing together in the savannas of Africa.

title: Attack of the Devil Shark
desc: A deadly tiger shark in the Caribbean sparks 'Devil Shark' fears, but researchers tracking it find underwater earthquakes are making sharks aggressive.

title: Jungle Planet
desc: Exploring the many evergreen forests in the old continent that boast of a wide range of flora and fauna.

title: River Monsters
desc: Jeremy was once pulled into a river by a goonch catfish during his very first investigation. Years later, he is worried that the monster has reappeared.

title: Wild Cats
desc: The filmmaker captures the breathtaking moments from the wild cats' daily activities in Asia, highlighting their heart-warming time with their families and dangerous hunting trails.

title: China's Wild Secrets
desc: In southwestern China, towering mountains provide shelter for nearly 2,000 wild giant pandas. Giant Panda National Park is three times the size of Yellowstone and is home to over 10,000 species.

title: Air Jaws: The Hunt for Colossus
desc: The breach of a massive great white in New Zealand triggers an expedition to find Colossus, a mythical shark thought to reveal a secret great white colony.
